CREATE TABLE numbers (x INT, y INT);
SELECT x, y, least_common_multiple(x, y) AS lcm FROM numbers WHERE x IS NOT NULL AND y IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.x, t2.y, least_common_multiple(t1.x, t2.y) AS lcm FROM (SELECT 1 AS x UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT NULL) AS t1 CROSS JOIN (SELECT 3 AS y UNION SELECT 0 UNION SELECT -5) AS t2;
SELECT least_common_multiple(a, 10) AS lcm FROM additional_values;
SELECT a, least_common_multiple(a, b) FROM (SELECT 4 AS a, 12 AS b UNION SELECT 6, 8 UNION SELECT 0, 15) AS subquery WHERE a IS NOT NULL AND b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT lcm FROM (SELECT least_common_multiple(4, 6) AS lcm) AS temp_table;

WITH recursive lcm_table AS (SELECT 1 AS m, 1 AS n, least_common_multiple(m, n) AS lcm UNION ALL SELECT m + 1, n + 1, least_common_multiple(m + 1, n + 1) FROM lcm_table WHERE m < 10) SELECT * FROM lcm_table;
